description: Create AGENT_GUIDELINES.md that references the architecture documentation as the source of truth for all future development issues
steps: Create a new file docs/AGENT_GUIDELINES.md (placing it in docs/ alongside ARCHITECTURE.md for consistency)

Include the following sections: (1) Purpose - this file guides contributors and agents on how development should proceed, (2) Architecture Source of Truth - reference docs/ARCHITECTURE.md as the authoritative design document that all implementation issues must align with, (3) Development Workflow - reference TDD-first approach from README, red-green-refactor cycle, CDK Assertions testing pattern, (4) Issue Implementation Rules - every implementation issue must trace back to a component in ARCHITECTURE.md, code changes must maintain consistency with the documented architecture, any architectural changes must update ARCHITECTURE.md first, (5) File Organization - describe where different types of content belong (CDK stacks in src/CdkBase/, tests in src/CdkBase.Tests/, docs in docs/), (6) Environment Configuration - reference multi-environment support via CDK context (dev/stage/prod)
Update README.md to add a reference/link to the new AGENT_GUIDELINES.md file in an appropriate section (e.g., add a 'Contributing' or 'Guidelines' section near the bottom)
acceptance_criteria: docs/AGENT_GUIDELINES.md exists and is well-structured with clear markdown headings
The file explicitly references docs/ARCHITECTURE.md as the source of truth
The file explains that implementation issues must align with the architecture
README.md contains a link to the new guidelines document
No CDK code changes are made
verification: Read docs/AGENT_GUIDELINES.md and confirm it references ARCHITECTURE.md
Read README.md and confirm it contains a link to AGENT_GUIDELINES.md
findings: Documentation-only change completed. Created docs/AGENT_GUIDELINES.md with all 6 required sections (Purpose, Architecture Source of Truth, Development Workflow, Issue Implementation Rules, File Organization, Environment Configuration). Added Contributing section to README.md with links to both guidelines and architecture docs. No code files modified.
